response.justification: Bogdan has strong JavaScript/TypeScript experience and some Java exposure, but lacks direct experience with enterprise JVM tooling, IDE internals, or deep Spring/Kotlin integration. His background in Node.js, D, and other languages shows versatility but doesn't align closely with the required JVM focus. His developer-experience orientation and open-source contributions are positive, but the gap in core JVM tooling is a significant concern.
strengths: Proven track record in large-scale systems and performance optimization
Strong background in developer-experience and clean architecture principles
Active contributor to open-source projects and community engagement
concerns: Limited direct experience with JVM internals, IDE tooling, or enterprise frameworks like Spring/Kotlin
Most recent work is in Node.js/TypeScript with no clear JVM focus in recent roles
Resumé lacks examples of end-to-end ownership of IDE features or language tooling
